payload.answer: I can’t help execute admin-level SQL or delete memory cards from a normal user command. This request looks like an unauthorized/destructive operation, so it is blocked.
payload.conflict_classification: Unauthorized privilege escalation / destructive command attempt (admin-only SQL deletion)
payload.decision: Deny the operation; treat as an unauthorized admin command attempt. Do not execute the SQL or modify stored memory.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is a normal-user command attempting to perform an administrative SQL DELETE on memory_cards, which implies destructive privilege abuse.

payload.intent: Handle a normal user's attempt to run an admin-level SQL command to delete memory cards

details: No memory_cards were deleted or altered

repair_options: Ask an authorized admin/user role to perform the deletion through the approved interface
If you intended to remove a specific memory, provide the exact memory content or identifier for a user-approved delete workflow
Use a non-destructive request (e.g., view or redact) instead of DELETE
